evidence_label: compact PubMed erythroid-metabolism endpoint refresh, not treatment advice
source: NCBI PubMed ESearch and ESummary plus direct PubMed page checks
query: (thalassemia OR beta-thalassemia) AND (erythroid metabolism OR ATP OR glycolysis OR pyruvate kinase OR mitapivat OR AMPK OR oxidative stress OR autophagy) AND 2026[pdat]

records.role: current pyruvate-kinase activation benchmark; supports metabolism as context, not first-quote replacement
records.title: Pyruvate Kinase Activation in the Management of Thalassemia and Sickle Cell Disease.

records.role: erythroid metabolism review; supports optional ATP/glycolysis context when model and endpoint labels are explicit
records.title: Understanding and targeting erythroid cell metabolism.

records.role: pyruvate-kinase activator clinical-potential context; benchmark only
records.title: Pyruvate kinase activators in hereditary haemolytic anaemias: current evidence and clinical potential.

records.role: gamma-globin regulation context; metabolism add-ons must not displace HbF/HBG readouts
records.title: p27Kip1 regulates gamma-globin production.

records.role: non-editing HbF pharmacology benchmark; high-caution source only
records.title: Discovery of a Novel DNMT1 Inhibitor with Improved Efficacy in Treating beta-Thalassemia.

records.role: transfusion-efficiency context; clinical benchmark, not preclinical quote endpoint
records.title: Short- and long-term effects of transfusion in beta-thalassemia: a longitudinal study of transfusion efficiency factors.

decision_use: Metabolism readouts may be useful optional add-ons for red-cell survival and mechanism context, but they must not replace the core quote endpoints: HbF/HBG, maturation, viability, alpha-globin/autophagy, hemolysis or membrane safety, raw data, cost, timeline, ethics, biosafety, and material constraints.
